name: autonomous-engineer
description: Autonomous engineering team for Claude Code. 15 specialist subagents (Engineering Director, Technical Lead, Solutions Architect, QA Reproducer/Validator/Comms/Env-Manager, Software Engineer, Product Engineer, Full Stack Engineer, Code/Security/Performance/Architecture reviewers, Engineering Manager), 9 slash commands (/ticket, /bug, /feature, /review, /qa, /pr, /status, /resume, /setup), and 9 skills covering the six workflow patterns, bug & feature pipelines, ticket and PR protocols, multi-tenant validation, MCP setup, and progress reporting. Takes a ticket from intake to Pull Request.
